name: adanos-market-sentiment
description: Chrome extension for stock market sentiment from the Adanos Market Sentiment API.

scripts.dist:zip: rm -f adanos-market-sentiment.zip && pnpm build && find dist -name .DS_Store -delete && cd dist && zip -r ../adanos-market-sentiment.zip . -x '*.DS_Store' '__MACOSX/*'
scripts.verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
